prompt: 我有个 skill 叫 bug-hunter，description 是 'Helps find bugs in code'，但它基本不会被自动触发，用户问我 bug 的时候都得 /bug-hunter 手动调。帮我改 description，让它该触发时触发，又不会每次写代码都误触发。skill 的能力范围是：从错误日志、stack trace、或者用户描述的异常症状里找根因并定位到具体代码行。

assertions.description: New description is intent-forward ('用户...时进入' / 'When X happens'), not capability-style ('Helps find...')
New description includes concrete user trigger phrases that match realistic bug-reporting scenarios (stack trace, error log, symptom)
New description has explicit boundary / exclusion to prevent over-triggering on any coding task
Rationale explains why the old description ('Helps find bugs in code') failed to auto-trigger — diagnoses the actual root cause
Output is primarily in Chinese (matches user's language)
New description (plus when_to_use if any) is under the 1,536-character cap
